_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Re-baselined for dashboard export introduction. break=95 (set at 95.79 after stocks.ts gained renderDashboardHtml + escapeHtml + defaultDashboardPath + isSafeDashboardPath + exportDashboardImpl — adds ~240 mutants, 76 currently survive in HTML-template + path-validation regions; the 10 other files remain at 100% covered). Re-baseline event (cf. stocks 92.75 → 100, advisor 96.37 → 100). Target: drive stocks.ts → 100% and ratchet back to 99.8.
